name: Coffee Liqueur Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs and sugar in a large mixing bowl until well blended.
2. Scald evaporated milk and coffee powder over medium heat until bubbles appear around the edge.
3. Gradually stir about 2 cups of hot evaporated milk mixture into egg mixture.
4. Blend egg mixture into remaining hot milk mixture.
5. Cook, stirring, over low heat until mixture thickens slightly.
6. Remove from heat and refrigerate until well chilled.
7. Stir in coffee liqueur.
8. Pour into an ice cream freezer container.
9. Churn and freeze according to manufacturer's directions.
10. Makes 2 quarts
